description: Commercial Driver License Processing — manages CDL applications, endorsements, medical certifications, and FMCSA Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse checks

hard_stops.label: FMCSA Clearinghouse Violation Found
hard_stops.logic: Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse query returned an unresolved violation — CDL issuance prohibited per 49 CFR 382.701

hard_stops.label: Medical Certificate Expired or Missing
hard_stops.logic: DOT medical certificate (Form MCSA-5876) is expired or not on file — CDL cannot be renewed or issued

hard_stops.label: Skills Test Not Passed
hard_stops.logic: Applicant has not passed the required CDL skills test for the requested class and endorsements

soft_flags.label: Hazmat Endorsement TSA Check Pending
soft_flags.logic: Hazmat endorsement requested — TSA security threat assessment must be completed before endorsement can be added

soft_flags.label: Medical Variance Required
soft_flags.logic: Applicant disclosed a condition requiring FMCSA medical exemption or skill performance evaluation
